title: Transfer of Ship Due to Sale or Change of Management.  In case of sale
content: 39 of ship or change of management necessarily involving a change in principal/employer, 40 the LMA of the new principal automatically assumes full and complete responsibility over 41 the seafarer originally recruited and deployed by the previous LMA, if the seafarer opts to 42 sign an employment contract with the new principal. Otherwise, the LMA which originally 43 recruited and deployed the seafarer shall retain full and complete responsibility over the 44 contractual obligations of the original principal. This assumption of responsibility takes 45 effect without the necessity of executing an Affidavit of Assumption of Responsibility. 46 47 The original LMA remains fully responsible for fulfilling the contractual obligations of the 48 original principal to all crew members deployed for the said vessel. This includes 49 addressing any pending claims that may be owed to the seafarers for their previous 50 employment with the previous principal/employer. The transfer of the vessel to another 51 manning agency due to sale of ship or change of management/principal, does not absolve 52 the original LMA from their responsibility towards the crew members deployed for that 53 specific vessel in accordance with the terms and conditions of their employment contract. 54 55
